title: Did you want to tell me something?
question: 把今天的“暂时不能正常说话 + 用动作或文字沟通 + 间接问题”放进诊所或校医室场景：你嘴里有药棉，不能说清楚，但要表达重要信息。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: I could not answer clearly because my mouth was full of cotton wool. The dentist asked me whether I felt better. I either nodded or wrote a note. Meanwhile, I pointed to the tooth that still hurt. I wrote that the pain was on the left side.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 说明你暂时不能清楚回答：我不能清楚回答，因为嘴里塞着药棉
options.english_template: I could not ___ clearly because my mouth was full of cotton wool.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 用间接问题转述牙医的问题：牙医问我是否感觉好一点
options.english_template: The dentist asked me ___ I felt better.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 用 either...or... 表达两种沟通方式：我不是点头，就是写纸条
options.english_template: I either nodded or ___ a note.

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 用 Meanwhile 切到同时发生的动作：与此同时，我指向还在疼的那颗牙
options.english_template: ___, I pointed to the tooth that still hurt.

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 写出重要信息：疼痛在左边
options.english_template: I wrote that the pain was ___ the left side.
